zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Drysdale於大約1550年出生在蘇格蘭時，她的父親Alexander Drysdale20歲，母親Margaret Stevin23歲。她和James George Patoun至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1615年4月26日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾享年66歲。

zh-hans.Aberdeen, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: 苏格兰阿爾迪史爾阿爾迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Drysdale于大约1550年出生在苏格兰时，她的父亲Alexander Drysdale20岁，母亲Margaret Stevin23岁。她和James George Patoun至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1615年4月26日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drysdale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dryfesdale near Dumfries (which is normally pronounced Drysdale), named from the river Dryfe + Old English dæl ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Drysdale was born about 1550, in Scotland, her father, Alexander Drysdale, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Stevin, was 23. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with James George Patoun. She died on 26 April 1615, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Drysdale est née environ 1550, à Écosse, son père, Alexander Drysdale, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stevin, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec James George Patoun. Elle est décédée le 26 avril 1615, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Drysdale um 1550 in Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Drysdale 20 und ihre Mutter Margaret Stevin 23. Sie hatte mit James George Patoun mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. April 1615 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Drysdale è nata il circa 1550 nel Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Drysdale, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margaret Stevin, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con James George Patoun. Morì il 26 aprile 1615, nel Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Drysdaleが約1550年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Alexander Drysdaleは20歳，母Margaret Stevinは23歳であった。彼女はJames George Patounとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1615年4月26日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Drysdale(이)가 대략 1550년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Drysdale(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stevin(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 James George Patoun(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1615년 4월 26일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Drysdale nasceu aproximadamente 1550, em Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Drysdale, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stevin, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com James George Patoun. Ela faleceu em 26 de abril de 1615, em Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Drysdale родилась около 1550 г. в местности Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Drysdale было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stevin, 23. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от James George Patoun. Она умерла 26 апреля 1615 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Drysdale nació aproximadamente 1550, en Scotland, su papá, Alexander Drysdale, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margaret Stevin, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con James George Patoun. Murió el 26 de abril de 1615, en Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
